meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome can't finish projects. A Beginner-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: User Onboarding to Solve Can't Finish Projects
content.seo_description: Learn how to implement high-conversion user onboarding to overcome project abandonment. A Beginner-level guide using Antigravity and Claude Code.
content.answer_block: The root cause of project abandonment is a lack of 'time-to-value.' By implementing a frictionless, guided user onboarding flow, you bridge the gap between registration and the 'Aha!' moment. Use AI-driven scaffolding to build your onboarding logic, ensuring users immediately experience your product's core value proposition before they churn.
content.intro:
The graveyard of SaaS is filled with products that were 90% finished but lacked the soul to keep a user past the first login. You know the feeling: the codebase is bloated, the vision is blurred, and the lack of user retention makes you want to pivot to the next shiny object. You aren't failing because you can't code; you're failing because you haven't built a path for your user to succeed.

Great products don't just exist; they escort the user to victory. By mastering user onboarding, you transform your unfinished prototype into a high-retention machine. This is your blueprint for building a frictionless, automated onboarding sequence that forces your project across the finish line and into the hands of paying customers.

steps.title: Define the 'Aha!' Moment
steps.description: Identify the single action that delivers value. This is the goal of your onboarding flow.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my project codebase and suggest a 3-step 'Aha!' moment flow for new users based on the core value proposition.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'analyze project files and generate a JSON schema for a 3-step onboarding flow'

steps.title: Build the Scaffolding
steps.description: Generate the frontend components for the onboarding modal or wizard.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a reusable React onboarding modal component that handles progress tracking and data collection.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add 'create OnboardingModal.tsx with Framer Motion animations'

steps.title: Implement State Persistence
steps.description: Ensure the user doesn't lose progress if they refresh the page.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Implement a hook to persist onboarding progress in localStorage and sync with the database on completion.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit 'add useOnboarding hook to manage user progress state'

steps.title: Add Contextual Tooltips
steps.description: Guide the user through the dashboard without overwhelming them.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a utility to trigger context-aware tooltips based on the user's current interaction level.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add 'implement Joyride or similar tooltip logic based on current route'

steps.title: Automate Success Emails
steps.description: Trigger a welcome email sequence upon onboarding completion.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a backend service function to trigger a SendGrid email when the onboarding status is marked as 'complete'.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create onboarding-complete event handler and integrate with SendGrid API'

pro_tips: Never ask for more than one piece of information per onboarding screen.
Show a progress bar; users are psychologically wired to complete tasks that look partially finished.
Use 'empty states' as onboarding opportunities instead of just saying 'No data found'.
Track the drop-off rate at every step of your onboarding to identify where your UX is failing.
Offer a 'Skip' button; forcing users through a tutorial they don't want is a fast track to churn.
content.next_steps: Deploy your onboarding flow to a staging environment, run a user testing session with 5 peers, and iterate based on their drop-off points.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting your projects die in the draft folder. You have the tools to ship, the logic to retain, and the vision to scale. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
